sections.paragraph:
[“Eth. ከራለ፡ to divide equally, to distribute; whence ክፋል፡ part, portion; Arab. كِفْلُ portion, equal part; and Dual كِفْلَانِ כִּפְלַיִם.”] to fold together, to double, Exo 26:6 part. pass. doubled, Exo 28:16 39:9 (Chald. קַפֵּלּ to double, to roll up; Syr. Ethpe. ܙܬܶܩܦܶܠ to be doubled, folded together. In the western languages, by transposition, there answer to this πλέκο, plico.)

Niphal, to be doubled, or repeated, Eze 21:19. Hence מַכְפֵּלָה and-
